rationale: The cited paper develops a discrete-emotion compatibility framework (emotion valence × self/other relatedness with message referent) and process evidence on persuasion/processing, which is conceptually close to the citing paper’s focus on awe, message-product incongruity, and framing-based boundary conditions.
